summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (remove ProfileSetup popup) is addressed by removing ProfileSetup from App.tsx and the file-summaries confirm it is no longer rendered. REQ-2 (update hero headline) is implemented in Hero.tsx with the exact text 'Urban Thekedaar — We build structures for generations'. REQ-3 (hardcoded admin login) is implemented in AdminPanel.tsx with ADMIN_USERNAME/ADMIN_PASSWORD constants and a login form with session persistence via SESSION_KEY.

hallucinated_features.description: Updates to AboutUs, Process, WhyUs, Footer, and Chatbot components beyond the scoped requirements
hallucinated_features.reason: The file-summaries describe changes to AboutUs (company description, tagline, principle cards), Process (four new workflow steps), WhyUs (feature cards, promise banner), Footer (attribution), and Chatbot (anonymous submission) — none of which were requested in the build spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Anonymous submission enabled for EstimateCalculator and Contact forms (removed authentication checks)
hallucinated_features.reason: The file-summaries indicate login checks were removed from EstimateCalculator and Contact components, allowing anonymous submissions. This was not part of any requirement.
A new LoginButton component using useInternetIdentity was added per the file summary, which was not requested.
